title: rubus × horridithyrsus
intro: Rubus × horridithyrsus is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the wild raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × horridithyrsus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × horridithyrsus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
